upasargachandrika.example_text: 'hfdayaM viGawwitaM cet saNgo virahaM viSezayati' (SfNgAra0 65) vipUrvo'yamatiSaye vartate iti BAnujiH viSezayati=atiSete'tikrAmati avizahyataro duHKataro BavatIti tAtparyArTaH
'asya kAvyasya kavayo na samarTA viSezaRe' (BA0 Adi0 173) viSezaRe'tiSAyane
'yatamAnopi yaM Sakro na viSezayati sma ha' (BA0 ASva0 516) ukto'rTaH
'etadeva tata ucCizyate vAgityeva' (E0 brA0 53) pariSizyate urvaritaM BavatItyarTaH
'yezAM dArAH pratIkzante suvfzwimiva karzakAH ucCezapariSezaM hi tAnBojaya yuDizWira' (BA0 anu0 1349).. ucCezaM BaktaSezam ucCizwam
'indro yatIn sAlAvfkeByaH prAyacCat tezAM traya udaSizyanta' (paYca0 brA0 1347) udaSizyanta avASizyanta avaSizwA aBUvan
'mA tasyocCezi kiMcana' (tE0 brA0 2412) kimapi SizwaM mABUt
'yezAM vArAH pratIkzante suvfzwimiva karzakAH ucCezapariSezaM hi tAn Bojaya yuDizWira' (BA0 anu0 2349) pariSizwaM sTAlyAmavaSizwam
